quality.interpretation: Do not repeat as a recommendation; use as cautionary evidence.

edit_plan.note: Reduce approach region incentive to lower dominance and decrease hovering.

recommend_next: If stagnation penalty and weight shifts succeed, consider adding structural exploration for direct time- or velocity‑based shaping metrics to further improve landing speed.
applicability_notes: Edits target the shaping_goal_mismatch fault; event rules are left untouched as they are already one‑time and suit the task.

recommend_next: If stagnation penalty and weight shifts succeed, consider adding structural exploration for direct time- or velocity‑based shaping metrics to further improve landing speed.
applicability_notes: Edits target the shaping_goal_mismatch fault; event rules are left untouched as they are already one‑time and suit the task.

summary: Shaping reward overemphasises approach region, causing task failure due to slow and fuel‑inefficient landings. Current event rules already prevent exploitation, but the agent never triggers them. Adjusting dense component weights and adding a stagnation penalty will better align the learned reward with the true goal of fast, safe landing.
